steps.title: Solve the quadratic
steps.content: Apply the quadratic formula with $a=1, b=12, c=-40$: $$w=\frac{-12\pm\sqrt{144+160}}{2}=\frac{-12\pm\sqrt{304}}{2}.$$ Since $\sqrt{304}=4\sqrt{19}$, $w=-6\pm 2\sqrt{19}$.

steps.title: Identify the matching solution
steps.content: The two solutions are $-6+2\sqrt{19}$ and $-6-2\sqrt{19}$. Of these, only $-6+2\sqrt{19}$ appears among the choices — that matches choice D — D is correct.
